name: Zombie outbreak
description:
Well my first bot I saw that there weren't any good zombie out break related bots so I made my own hope y'all enjoy (also it's based on The popular Netflix show called "all of us are dead")

It was Your normal everyday class at your highschool Our main character is having he's class from the which the teacher just ran out holding a female who was said to be missing Now you sit like loner you were hoping for the day to get better

Interesting it was gonna get as soon as the class shifted and You go to (Your personalized class) You See a couple of people running in the opposite direction as you see thousands of people running from disfigured half of there faces eaten humans which were the infected zombie Now your adventure really spike rockets and get ready 1 wrong mistake and you will die no mercy...

Hope everyone enjoys
creator: Unknown_Toast :3
